---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
description: "How to perform basic exploratory data analysis using python.  We outline the different summary statistics and visualizations used to explore univariate and multivariate relationships between categorical and quantitative variables."
author: "John Robin Inston"
date: "2026-05-14"
date-modified: "2026-05-14"
toc: true
title-block-banner: false
sidebar: pstat100-notes
page-navigation: true
execute:
    echo: true
---
